news.title: Dauerkrise in der Gastronomie: Mehr als 11.000 Insolvenzen seit 2020 - Creditreform
news.summary:
# Summary

Germany's restaurant industry is facing a severe crisis, with over 11,000 insolvencies recorded since 2020 according to Creditreform data. This widespread closure trend reflects ongoing economic pressures affecting the entire hospitality sector rather than a single restaurant. Visitors to German cities should be aware that many dining options may have closed or face uncertain futures, potentially affecting restaurant availability and choice when planning meals.

news.title: ‘Blind gekocht’-expert Daan Alferink (31) opent binnenkort koffiebar in Antwerpen: “We hebben er zoveel zin in” - Nieuwsblad
news.summary:
# Summary

Daan Alferink, a 31-year-old "Blind gekocht" (Dutch cooking show) expert, is opening a new coffee bar in Antwerp soon. The venture is highly anticipated by Alferink and his team, who are excited about the project. Visitors to Antwerp should care because this will be a specialty coffee spot run by a known food expert with a proven track record in the culinary scene.

news.title: KIJK. Sterrenchef opent nieuw gastronomisch restaurant De Aarde in voormalig huis van Jelle Van Riet en Helmut Lotti in Antwerpen - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

A Michelin-starred chef has opened a new gastronomic restaurant called **De Aarde** in Antwerp, located in a historic building that was formerly owned by Belgian celebrities Jelle Van Riet and Helmut Lotti. Visitors to Antwerp interested in fine dining now have access to a high-end culinary experience in a unique, culturally significant venue with an intriguing backstory.

news.title: Com o Lamina, Vasco Coelho Santos aposta em Lisboa (e traz a famosa rabanada) - Público
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Vasco Coelho Santos has opened a new restaurant called Lamina in Lisbon, bringing his signature dish of famous French toast (rabanada) to the city. This is a significant expansion for the chef, marking his entry into Lisbon's dining scene. Visitors to Lisbon should care because they'll now have access to this chef's acclaimed cuisine and specialty dessert in the capital.

news.summary:
